narrative: US labor market strength and Iran peace uncertainty drive a dollar recovery as crude oil rallies — USD/JPY at 159.93 tests the 160.00 intervention threshold; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid despite a -1.10 moderate put skew in 25d risk reversals. AUD/CHF bilateral divergence (+0.83% spread) reflects a 435bp carry advantage for AUD; gold lower -0.03%; equities +0.13%; DXY +0.02%; VIX 15.8. Watch Australia GDP at 01:30 UTC for AUD directional risk.
